translations.Child schemas can only add constraints,: Child schemas can only add constraints, never relax them (Liskov substitution principle). Metadata (title, description, order) can be overridden.

translations.Instance must validate against all selec: Instance must validate against all selected schemas. Properties from all parent schemas are merged. This is the recommended pattern for schema extension and multiple inheritance.
translations.Instance must validate against at least: Instance must validate against at least one of the selected schemas. Properties are not merged. More permissive than oneOf.
translations.Instance must validate against exactly o: Instance must validate against exactly one of the selected schemas. Properties are not merged. Use for discriminated unions or type variants.
translations.Invalid schema reference: Expected strin: Invalid schema reference: Expected string, got number ({value}). This will be sent to backend as-is.

translations.When on (default), logged-in users quali: When on (default), logged-in users qualify for any rule that targets the `public` group. Disable to make authenticated access strictly gated by explicit group memberships — anonymous users are unaffected either way.

translations.Capabilities listed here are auto-genera: Capabilities listed here are auto-generated from the openspec/specs/ directory once a status is set to "implemented" or "reviewed".

translations.Could not submit — please retry. If the: Could not submit — please retry. If the issue persists, file it directly on GitHub.
